title: Druckzentrum – Print Center
description: A CUPS-backed print center for Linux: print any file, manage the queue with live progress, administer printers, scan via SANE and track supply levels. Runs as a small local web app with zero Python dependencies.

title: N-Body Problem Simulation
description: A simple Simulation of the famous N-Body Problem

title: TAP – Tournament Manager
description: Full-stack tournament management platform with a Rust (Actix-web) REST API, JWT authentication, and a Next.js frontend. Backed by PostgreSQL via SeaORM and containerised with Docker.

title: Open DnD
description: A developer productivity CLI written in Rust with Tauri. Build and Manage your Own DnD Character

title: McLookup
description: A small utility library for Looking up Minecraft Character Data in Kotlin

title: JDA Command Manager
description: A minimal, fast Command Manager for the Discord API - JDA.
